headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on LyondellBasell Industries, Lowers Price Target to $80
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Michael Sison   maintains LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $87 to $80.
